overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking along a rocky riverbank, crossing shallow water, and traversing a golden grassland with misty mountains and autumn forests in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky river shoreline with mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky riverbank toward the water's edge

entered.detail: misty mountain range with snow-capped peaks in the background
calm turquoise river water flowing through the valley
rocky and pebble-strewn shoreline along the river edge
dense forest with orange and golden autumn foliage on the distant shore

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rocky riverbank with a turquoise river flowing to the right. Misty mountains rise in the background while autumn-colored forests line the distant shore under a clear sky.

events.description: character steps into the shallow river and begins wading through the water

agents.ego_description: wading through the shallow river water toward the opposite bank

entered.detail: large boulder partially submerged in the middle of the river
grassy shoreline on the opposite side of the river

segments.scene_description: The character enters the turquoise river and wades through shallow water, passing a large boulder in the center of the stream while approaching the grassy opposite bank.

events.description: exits the river onto sandy bank and enters tall golden grass field

agents.ego_description: walking through tall golden grass toward the distant autumn tree line

entered.detail: field of tall golden grass swaying in the wind
sandy transition area between the river and the grassland

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the river, the character walks through a vast field of tall golden grass. The autumn forest grows closer on the left while misty mountains continue to dominate the horizon ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a rocky riverbank into a vast, golden grassland. It begins with the character walking along the edge of a turquoise river, with misty mountains and autumn-colored forests framing the distant horizon under a clear sky. As the character leaves the bank, the camera follows them wading through the shallow turquoise water and passing a large central boulder. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the opposite shore, moving from the riverbed into a wide expanse of tall golden grass. Finally, the camera continues forward as the autumn forest draws closer on the left while the misty mountains remain dominant on the horizon.
